name: @ai-di/load-testing
description: Bulk data seeding and load-test helpers for ai-di

scripts.k6:smoke: sh -c 'mkdir -p results && if command -v k6 >/dev/null 2>&1; then k6 run --summary-export=results/k6-smoke-summary.json k6/smoke.js; else chmod a+rwx results 2>/dev/null || true; docker run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/k6:/scripts:ro" -v "$PWD/results:/results" -e BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:3002}" -e LOAD_TEST_API_KEY -e LOAD_TEST_GROUP_ID grafana/k6 run --summary-export=/results/k6-smoke-summary.json /scripts/smoke.js; fi'
scripts.k6:datasets: sh -c 'mkdir -p results && if command -v k6 >/dev/null 2>&1; then k6 run --summary-export=results/k6-datasets-summary.json k6/read-benchmark-datasets.js; else chmod a+rwx results 2>/dev/null || true; docker run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/k6:/scripts:ro" -v "$PWD/results:/results" -e BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:3002}" -e LOAD_TEST_API_KEY -e LOAD_TEST_GROUP_ID -e LOAD_TEST_VUS -e LOAD_TEST_DURATION grafana/k6 run --summary-export=/results/k6-datasets-summary.json /scripts/read-benchmark-datasets.js; fi'
scripts.k6:documents: sh -c 'mkdir -p results && if command -v k6 >/dev/null 2>&1; then k6 run --summary-export=results/k6-documents-summary.json k6/stress-documents-list.js; else chmod a+rwx results 2>/dev/null || true; docker run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/k6:/scripts:ro" -v "$PWD/results:/results" -e BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:3002}" -e LOAD_TEST_API_KEY -e LOAD_TEST_GROUP_ID -e LOAD_TEST_VUS -e LOAD_TEST_DURATION grafana/k6 run --summary-export=/results/k6-documents-summary.json /scripts/stress-documents-list.js; fi'
scripts.k6:upload-ocr: sh -c 'mkdir -p results && if command -v k6 >/dev/null 2>&1; then k6 run --summary-export=results/k6-upload-ocr-summary.json k6/upload-ocr-workflow.js; else chmod a+rwx results 2>/dev/null || true; docker run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/k6:/scripts:ro" -v "$PWD/results:/results" -e BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:3002}" -e LOAD_TEST_API_KEY -e LOAD_TEST_GROUP_ID -e LOAD_TEST_WORKFLOW_VERSION_ID -e LOAD_TEST_MODEL_ID -e LOAD_TEST_VUS -e LOAD_TEST_DURATION -e LOAD_TEST_SLEEP_SECONDS -e LOAD_TEST_RUN_ID -e LOAD_TEST_UPLOAD_FILE_BASE64 -e LOAD_TEST_UPLOAD_FILE_PATH -e LOAD_TEST_UPLOAD_PAYLOAD_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_SIZE_TIER -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_SMALL_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_MEDIUM_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_LARGE_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_BODY_LIMIT -e BODY_LIMIT grafana/k6 run --summary-export=/results/k6-upload-ocr-summary.json /scripts/upload-ocr-workflow.js; fi'
scripts.k6:payload-sizes: sh -c 'mkdir -p results && if command -v k6 >/dev/null 2>&1; then k6 run --summary-export=results/k6-payload-sizes-summary.json k6/upload-ocr-workflow.js; else chmod a+rwx results 2>/dev/null || true; docker run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/k6:/scripts:ro" -v "$PWD/results:/results" -e BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:3002}" -e LOAD_TEST_API_KEY -e LOAD_TEST_GROUP_ID -e LOAD_TEST_WORKFLOW_VERSION_ID -e LOAD_TEST_MODEL_ID -e LOAD_TEST_VUS -e LOAD_TEST_DURATION -e LOAD_TEST_SLEEP_SECONDS -e LOAD_TEST_RUN_ID -e LOAD_TEST_UPLOAD_FILE_BASE64 -e LOAD_TEST_UPLOAD_FILE_PATH -e LOAD_TEST_UPLOAD_PAYLOAD_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_SIZE_TIER -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_SMALL_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_MEDIUM_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_LARGE_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_BODY_LIMIT -e BODY_LIMIT grafana/k6 run --summary-export=/results/k6-payload-sizes-summary.json /scripts/upload-ocr-workflow.js; fi'
scripts.k6:blob-storage: sh -c 'mkdir -p results && if command -v k6 >/dev/null 2>&1; then k6 run --summary-export=results/k6-blob-storage-summary.json k6/blob-storage-pressure.js; else chmod a+rwx results 2>/dev/null || true; docker run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/k6:/scripts:ro" -v "$PWD/results:/results" -e BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:3002}" -e LOAD_TEST_API_KEY -e LOAD_TEST_GROUP_ID -e LOAD_TEST_BLOB_CLASSIFIER_NAME -e LOAD_TEST_BLOB_PAYLOAD_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_BLOB_FILE_PATH -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_SIZE_TIER -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_SMALL_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_MEDIUM_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_PAYLOAD_LARGE_BYTES -e LOAD_TEST_BODY_LIMIT -e BODY_LIMIT -e LOAD_TEST_BLOB_FILES_PER_ITER -e LOAD_TEST_BLOB_CLEANUP -e LOAD_TEST_BLOB_DELETE_BEFORE_RUN -e LOAD_TEST_BLOB_LABEL -e LOAD_TEST_VUS -e LOAD_TEST_DURATION -e LOAD_TEST_SLEEP_SECONDS -e LOAD_TEST_RUN_ID grafana/k6 run --summary-export=/results/k6-blob-storage-summary.json /scripts/blob-storage-pressure.js; fi'
scripts.k6:review-hitl: sh -c 'mkdir -p results && if command -v k6 >/dev/null 2>&1; then k6 run --summary-export=results/k6-review-hitl-summary.json k6/review-hitl-apis.js; else chmod a+rwx results 2>/dev/null || true; docker run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/k6:/scripts:ro" -v "$PWD/results:/results" -e BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:3002}" -e LOAD_TEST_API_KEY -e LOAD_TEST_GROUP_ID -e LOAD_TEST_VUS -e LOAD_TEST_DURATION -e LOAD_TEST_SLEEP_SECONDS -e LOAD_TEST_HITL_MAX_CONFIDENCE -e LOAD_TEST_HITL_QUEUE_LIMIT -e LOAD_TEST_HITL_SESSION_MODE -e LOAD_TEST_HITL_REVIEW_STATUS grafana/k6 run --summary-export=/results/k6-review-hitl-summary.json /scripts/review-hitl-apis.js; fi'
